description_long: This is a medium-sized kabocha pumpkin with a deep green, slightly mottled rind and subtle vertical ridges running from top to bottom. A portion of the pumpkin has been cut away, revealing its vibrant orange flesh and a cluster of seeds and fibrous strands inside. The surface of the rind is matte and rough, with some natural blemishes and color variations. The stem is short, dry, and woody, positioned at the top center of the pumpkin. The cut section exposes the moist, dense interior, contrasting with the tough, textured exterior. No decorative carvings or accessories are present, and the pumpkin appears fresh and unaltered except for the cut.
description: A green kabocha pumpkin with a rough, ridged rind and a cut section exposing bright orange flesh and seeds. The pumpkin has a short stem and natural surface blemishes.
description_view_0: The cut section of the pumpkin is fully visible, showing orange flesh, seeds, and fibrous strands, with the stem and most of the rind also in view.
description_view_1: The pumpkin is seen from the side, with the cut section partially visible and the green, ridged rind dominating the view.
description_view_2: The uncut back of the pumpkin is shown, highlighting the full, rounded green rind with subtle mottling and no visible stem or cut.
description_view_3: The top of the pumpkin is visible, featuring the short, dry stem and the ridged, green surface with some yellowish spots.
